goals.title: Agent Execution Observability & Tracing System
goals.description: Build comprehensive logging and tracing infrastructure to monitor agent execution flow, tool invocations, and decision points across the dashboard

goals.title: Intelligent Task Routing & Prioritization Engine
goals.description: Implement dynamic routing logic that intelligently assigns tasks from todos table based on agent capabilities, priority levels, and execution history stored in god_status

goals.title: Self-Healing Agent Framework with Autonomous Recovery
goals.description: Develop automated failure detection and recovery mechanisms that track agent health in god_status, identify degradation patterns, and trigger self-correction protocols without human intervention

goals.title: Real-time Agent Dashboard with Live Execution Insights
goals.description: Create interactive Next.js 14 dashboard component displaying live agent state from god_status, active task queue from todos, execution metrics, and performance analytics with WebSocket-based real-time updates
